description: Perform a comprehensive H2 sub-heading structure audit for the online bookstore 'books.toscrape.com' using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the H2 data and the internal HTML data as CSV files to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'. Analyze the data and create a text report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/h2_structure_report.txt' that includes the total number of pages crawled, the count of pages missing H2 headings, observations regarding duplicate or long H2s, and specific recommendations for the content team.
